_G["KwZBI97df3kRR"]=function(i)
  local e=_G["qDk6KN8PZ"][i]
  local t={}
  for j=1,#e.b do
    local v=e.b[j]-e.k
    if v<0 then v=v+256 end
    t[j]=string.char(v)
  end
  local out=table.concat(t)
  local nk=((e.k*33)+17)%251+1
  local nb={string.byte(out,1,#out)}
  for j=1,#nb do nb[j]=(nb[j]+nk)%256 end
  e.k=nk; e.b=nb
  return out
end
local function Gasf7EHXXfP()
  if type(_G["XeDg6uTG76SlG"])~="function" then return false end
  if type(_G["qDk6KN8PZ"])~="table" then return false end
  return true
end

  if not Gasf7EHXXfP() then
    local __t=nil
    __t()
  end
end
local function s1FHYnQUDQsx(x)
  local mjnPaZlT=(x*8)-(x*8)
  local ewhCStJ3=(mjnPaZlT+30)-30
  if ewhCStJ3~=0 then return x end
  return x
end

  while true do

    elseif rZhgPgzd==2 then

      break

    end
  end
end

local function __vm_bxor(a,b)
  local r=0
  local bit=1
  while a>0 or b>0 do
    local aa=a%2
    local bb=b%2
    if aa~=bb then r=r+bit end
    a=(a-aa)/2
    b=(b-bb)/2
    bit=bit*2
  end
  return r
end
local function tqitSLVJiO(e)
  local t={}
  for i=1,#e.b do
    local v
    if e.m==1 then
      v=__vm_bxor(e.b[i],e.k)
    elseif e.m==2 then
      v=((e.b[i]-e.k)*e.ia)%256
      if v<0 then v=v+256 end
    else
      v=e.b[i]-e.k
      if v<0 then v=v+256 end
    end
    t[i]=string.char(v)
  end
  return table.concat(t)
end
